about.headline: Who I am
about.descriptionOne: Hey there, I'm Lukas! Write some information about yourself that is IT related. Why are you passionate about coding? What is your source of inspiration for improving your programming skills?
about.descriptionTwo: Where are you based? Would you be open to working remotely or potentially relocating?
about.descriptionThree: Show that you are open-minded. Are you enthusiastic about learning new technologies and  improving your skills?
about.descriptionFour: A brief description of your problem-solving approach. Do you learn from each challenge as you search for the most efficient or elegant solution? You can include some keywords like: analytical thinking, creativity, persistence and collaboration.

skills.headline: Skills Set
skills.description: A short introduction of your skills. Highlight your experience of  using different front-end technologies and emphasise your openness to learning and adapting to new technologies. Show how important it is for you to keep up with the rapid changes in web development.
skills.descriptionFour: Feel free to contact me. I look forward to expanding on my previous knowledge..

future.headline: Future Projects
future.description: Here you can find a selection of my work

friends.headline: What my colleagues say about me

contact.headline: Contact me
contact.headlineTwo: Do you have a problem to solve?
contact.headlineTwoDescription: Encourage people to contact you and describe what role you are interested in. Show that you’ll add value to their projects through your work.
contact.description: Do you need a frontend developer?
contact.name: What is your name?
contact.messagePlaceholder: Hello Lukas, I am interested in..
contact.privacy-police-text-two: and agree to the processing of my data as described.
